title: Align WatchTowerOversight to the shared pack contract
summary: Aligns the oversight pack to the shared core-host-pack contract in its own repository.
scope_items: Bring /home/j/WatchTowerOversight/oversight manifests, docs, workflows, and Python packaging into shared hosted-pack contract alignment.
Remove repo-specific pack drift that conflicts with the portable pack capsule rules.
done_when_items: The oversight pack matches the shared pack contract and validates cleanly in its own repository.
